acceptable_use_policy: Data is used for law enforcement purposes only. Data is owned by Bakersfield CA PD and is never sold to 3rd parties.
prohibited_uses: Immigration enforcement, traffic enforcement, harassment or intimidation, usage based solely on a protected class (i.e. race, sex, religion), personal use.
access_policy: All system access requires a valid reason and is stored indefinitely.
hotlist_policy:
Hotlist hits are required to be human verified prior to action.

Hotlist(s) are a digital file containing alphanumeric license plate related information pertaining to vehicles of interest, which may include stolen vehicles, stolen vehicle license plates, vehicles owned or associated with wanted or missing person(s), vehicles suspected of being involved with criminal or terrorist activities, and other legitimate law enforcement purposes.

overview: Bakersfield CA PD uses Flock Safety technology to capture objective evidence without compromising on individual privacy. Bakersfield CA PD utilizes retroactive search to solve crimes after they've occurred. Additionally, Bakersfield CA PD utilizes real time alerting of hotlist vehicles to capture wanted criminals.
